callout.p: 源码校准补充（2026-06-04）：本节上方 SDK 设计是目标态。当前已落地的本地 SDK 和 magcli 更聚焦部署和 session 调用链路，核心入口是 sdk/index.mjs 的 ManagedAgentsClient 与 scripts/magcli.mjs。

h3: 15.5 当前 SDK / magcli 生命周期
whiteboard: sequenceDiagram participant Dev as Developer participant CLI as magcli participant SDK as ManagedAgentsClient participant API as Express API participant Store as SQLite Store participant Runner as Session Runner Dev->>CLI: magcli init CLI->>Dev: mag.manifest.json + src/harness.mjs Dev->>CLI: magcli build CLI->>CLI: validate manifest and write .mag/build/bundle.json Dev->>CLI: magcli deploy CLI->>SDK: createDeployment(bundle) SDK->>API: POST /v1/deployments API->>Store: createAgent + createEnvironment + createAgentDeployment API-->>SDK: deployment id Dev->>CLI: magcli invoke message CLI->>SDK: invokeDeployment(deploymentId,message) SDK->>API: POST /v1/deployments/{id}/invoke API->>Store: createSession + user.message event API->>Runner: bootstrapSession + runUserMessage CLI->>SDK: poll sessionDetail or stream events

tr.td: 目标态 OAuth SDK helper 未实现
缺 deployment update/delete、publish 到 Agent Hub
当前是 EventEmitter + fetch reader；缺 Last-Event-ID、断线重连、cursor replay
